title: QueryGenie used Google PaLM 2 to turn plain-English business questions into SQL answers

targets.title: GitHub - Poorna-Chandra-D/QueryGenie-Ask-SQL-Without-SQL: QueryGenie empowers users to ask complex database questions in plain English and get precise answers without writing a single line of SQL. Powered by Google PaLM 2, LangChain, Huggin
